titleStmt.title: SII 10.530: original edition by J. Ramayya Pantulu
No. 530. (A.R. No. 178 of 1905.) ON THE WEST WALL OF THE CENTRAL SHRINE IN THE TEMPLE OF TRIPURĀNTAKĒŚVARA, TRIPURĀNTAKAM, MARKAPUR TALUK, KURNOOL DISTRICT. Ś. 12[42] (Raudri)

summary.p: States that Nēmāni Pina-Vichaya-Pregaḍa made a gift of the suṅkam on a garden to the temple of Tripurāntakadēva during the reign of Kākatīya Pratāpa-Rudradēva-Mahārāja.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī śubhaśakavarṣaṁbulu 12 nēṁṭi [raudri ?]saṁvatsara kārttika śu 15 śu nāṁṭi puṇyakālamappuḍu svasti
śrīmanmahāmaṁḍalēśvara kākatiyyapratāparudradēvamahārājulakuṁ buṇyamugānu svasti
śrīmatu sarvvādhikāru laina nēmāni taṁmayapregaḍaṁgāri paṁpunanu [Ā]koḍuku pinavica
yapregaḍaṁgāru svasti śrītripurāṁtakaśrīmanmahādēvarakuṁ jallipallini vāṟuvu poṁ
ṁtōṁṭa suṁkamu sarvamānyamugānu dhārāpūrvvakamugānu Ācaṁdrārkkamugānu
[I]stimi . svadattā dviguṇaṁ puṇyaṁ paradattānupālanaṁ paradattāpahārēṇa svadattaṁ niṣpala
ṁ bhavēt .
Digital edition of SII 10.530 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
